title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 2nd April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.price: issue price 392; wait for settle band 350-390 or 325-375
recommendations.note: Don't chase the listing; wait 2-3 days (up to a week) for the price to settle, then buy.
recommendations.detail: Asked what to do if it lists near 350 or around the 390 issue price, he said wait - the market is supreme always and one has to see where it bottoms out. Signs point to a weak open; large HNIs buying determinedly could push it contrary to the market, but such moves don't hold. It will take at least a week for a clear price band to form. Weak market and non-conducive timing for a new listing, but in the long run he sees this company giving good returns without any doubt.

recommendations.note: Decent stock with steady income; accumulate slowly in weakness, but watch rising raw-material cost.
recommendations.detail: He called it a good, decent stock making condoms and in-vitro diagnostic kits, already a near six- to seven-bagger over the last year. The open question is whether rising raw material cost will hurt it, which must be watched. Because income there is steady, one can accumulate slowly on weakness rather than buying in one go.

recommendations.note: No need to buy now at a 47 PE; wait - could fall to 230/210, buy nearer 200.
recommendations.detail: He said definitely wait a bit; there is no need to buy it now. Even after the market fall the stock is at a 47 PE, which he does not consider cheap, and the last quarter result was not great. If this quarter's result is also weak the stock could come back to 230 and 210 levels. Buying when it comes closer to 200 is better.

recommendations.price: staggered 5-10% tranches in the bottom zone
recommendations.note: Standard buy, but bottom-fish in 10% tranches rather than in one go.
recommendations.detail: He said as a standard he would say buy, doing a bottom-fish with a 10% investment and then another 10% if it falls further. Nobody can catch the absolute bottom or sell at the absolute top, so with fundamentally sound blue chips like this it is better to go on nibbling in the bottom zone 5% or 10% at a time.

recommendations.price: staggered 5-10% tranches in the bottom zone
recommendations.note: Standard buy, accumulated in 10% tranches on further falls.
recommendations.detail: Asked together with Bajaj Holdings, he gave the same answer: buy, but bottom-fish with a 10% investment and add another 10% if it falls further. With fundamentally sound blue chips he prefers nibbling in the bottom zone 5-10% at a time rather than trying to time an exact bottom.

recommendations.stock: Nippon India Small Cap (mutual fund SIP)
recommendations.note: Don't stop the SIP at -5% XIRR; continue with it.
recommendations.detail: A viewer running an SIP at -5% XIRR asked whether to close it. He said no, don't - continue it. Nippon Small Cap is okay; compared with schemes like Bandhan or Invesco it underperforms slightly, but he advised staying with it.
